title: Separator Component
content:
The Separator component provides a visual divider between elements. It's built using Radix UI's Separator primitive and styled with Tailwind CSS for flexibility. ## Key Exports * **`Separator`**: A React component for rendering a visual separator. ## Props The `Separator` component accepts the following props: * **`className`** (string): Allows for custom styling using Tailwind CSS classes. * **`orientation`** ('horizontal' | 'vertical'): Determines the orientation of the separator. Defaults to 'horizontal'. * **`decorative`** (boolean): Indicates whether the separator is purely decorative. Defaults to `true`. * ... (any other props accepted by `SeparatorPrimitive.Root`) ## Usage Example ```tsx import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'; function MyComponent() { return (

Content Above

{/* Horizontal separator */}

Content Below

Left Content {/* Vertical separator */} Right Content
); } ```
